_comment: Example PSMutant config. Copy into your repo, point `mutate` at pure/DB-free modules and `tests` at the Pester files that cover them. Paths are relative to -SourceRoot (default: current dir). Run: Invoke-PSMutation -ConfigFile ./psmutant.config.json
_timeout: Each mutant runs under a wall-clock timeout = max(timeoutFloorSeconds, baseline x timeoutFactor). A non-terminating mutant (e.g. a mutated loop body) is cut off and counted as Killed instead of hanging the run. Both optional; defaults 4 and 15.
